scripts.dev:convex: cd packages/convex && ln -sf ../../.env .env.local && bunx convex dev
scripts.setup:convex: cd packages/convex && ln -sf ../../.env .env.local && bunx convex dev --once
scripts.build:mobile: cd apps/mobile && bunx eas build -p android --profile development
scripts.build:mobile:android: cd apps/mobile && bunx eas build -p android --profile development
scripts.build:mobile:ios: cd apps/mobile && bunx eas build -p ios --profile development
